about.heading: Oscar Olg Photography — Editorial Wedding Photographer in Ciudad Juárez
paragraphs: I'm Oscar, the person behind Oscar Olg Photography. I work from Ciudad Juarez with a clear specialty: editorial wedding photography, portraits, and couple sessions designed to feel supported from the first conversation to delivery.

My work combines technical attention to detail with the artistic sensitivity needed to capture what matters most: people, connections, and moments worth preserving. I do not direct every second; I create the space for you to live your day freely while I document the essential with editorial intention.

I believe in wedding photography that feels natural, elegant, and deeply human. My promise is not only to deliver beautiful images, but to turn today's emotion into a tangible visual legacy you can relive for years.

From the first conversation, my goal is to give you clarity, guidance, and peace of mind so you can enjoy the process without stress. I want you to know that every irreplaceable moment is in safe hands.

services.mainPromise: NOT JUST A DAY, A LIFETIME
services.oscarStory: Your wedding goes fast. The planning, the months of anticipation, and then it's over in a blink of an eye. What stays with you forever are the memories and the photos. When you look back at those images years later—sharing them on your couch with your partner, showing your kids, on an anniversary—they need to reflect exactly how that day felt. That's why I take every wedding so seriously. It's not just about beautiful images. It's about creating a visual legacy that you can revisit 10, 20 years from now and feel that magic all over again. Every package I offer is built with you in mind: complete coverage without rigid formulas, cinematic editing that honors what's real, and a process from start to finish where you feel supported. Your wedding isn't just for today. It's for the moment you remember it forever.
services.customizableNote: Every package below is completely customizable. If you need adjustments, add-ons, or a different configuration, just share your details and we'll define the ideal option for your vision.

services.introLead: Your wedding goes by fast. What stays for decades is your visual legacy. This page is designed to guide you clearly from value to action.

pricingFaqs.question: What if we don't know how to pose?
pricingFaqs.answer: This is the most common concern, so don't worry. My approach is not to force awkward poses, but to guide you subtly so interaction feels natural. The Save the Date session works as a relaxed rehearsal to break the ice and help you discover how easy it is to look incredible.

pricingFaqs.question: We don't want to spend hours taking photos on the wedding day. We want to enjoy the party. How do you handle timing?
pricingFaqs.answer: Completely agree. We keep the formal couple session agile so you can quickly return to your event. The rest of the day is documentary coverage: my priority is capturing spontaneous moments, laughter, and real action without you worrying about the camera.

pricingFaqs.question: How long does it take to deliver our photos?
pricingFaqs.answer: With Signature, you receive a 30-photo Sneak Peek the next day so you can share immediately. The complete gallery with cinematic editing is delivered in approximately 4 to 6 weeks.

pricingFaqs.question: Are there hidden costs? What if the party is amazing and we want you to stay longer?
pricingFaqs.answer: Zero hidden costs. Transparency is a priority. If the dance floor is on fire and you decide to extend coverage, extra hours are available at $2,000 MXN each. You always control that decision.

pricingFaqs.question: Do you deliver all RAW files, or how does your cinematic style work?
pricingFaqs.answer: I do not deliver RAW files. I carefully curate the strongest moments and every delivered image includes our cinematic treatment: intentional color and light work that gives your memories a film-like finish.

pricingFaqs.question: Do you help us choose locations in Ciudad Juarez for our pre-wedding session?
pricingFaqs.answer: Absolutely. I share great location recommendations in the city and nearby areas, plus a quick guide on color palettes and outfits so everything stays aligned with the editorial style.

pricingFaqs.question: We love the experience. What's the next step to reserve our date?
pricingFaqs.answer: Simple: we schedule a short video call, choose the right collection for your day, and secure your date with a 30% retainer and digital contract. After that, I handle the rest.

faqs.question: What's the difference between editorial and traditional wedding photography?
faqs.answer: Editorial photography captures the genuine narrative of your wedding with a storytelling approach. Each photo tells part of your story—authentic moments and details that matter, not uncomfortable posed shots.

faqs.question: What does wedding coverage in Ciudad Juárez include?
faqs.answer: Full coverage from preparations through reception, focusing on genuine moments, elegant details, and your connection. A process designed so you can fully enjoy every second without stress.

faqs.question: What's the process to hire your services?
faqs.answer: Contact me via WhatsApp or the contact form, we discuss your vision and special needs, confirm date availability, and I provide a clear proposal with investment, coverage details, and next steps.

faqs.question: How do you preserve our wedding story?
faqs.answer: Through narrative photography that captures authentic emotions, your connection as a couple, and unique moments from your day. Each image is a scene in the movie of your story.

faqs.question: What cities do you serve besides Ciudad Juárez?
faqs.answer: My focus is Ciudad Juárez, though I can consider special requests. If your wedding is here, I have availability and deep knowledge of the best venues.

welcome.philosophyIntro: We know planning a wedding is demanding—it requires time, energy, and budget. That is why on your special day you shouldn't worry about posing stiffly in front of a camera or feel like you're missing your own celebration.
welcome.philosophyApproach: Through a 100% documentary approach and cinematic editing, we capture the real emotion of your day. We give you absolute freedom to laugh, toast, and be present with those you love most. We don't intervene in the magic—we simply make sure to document it from the best angles.
welcome.philosophyCore: The cake will be gone, but your story deserves to be lived without stress and remembered with style.
welcome.philosophyClosing: You live the moment; we transform it into the first great visual legacy of your new family.

packages.heading: Our Collections
packages.subheading: Each one is designed for you. Compare and choose what resonates with your vision.

collections.name: Collection: Signature
collections.subtitle: The Complete Legacy
collections.audience: Designed for the couple who wants to leave everything to us and enjoy their day with zero stress.
collections.promise: I'll be with you for 10 hours, capturing everything invisibly from the nervous excitement of makeup to the climax of the dance floor. This is for those who want not just a digital gallery, but the peace of mind knowing their story already includes a premium Photobook for their new home and a sneak peek for social media the next day. You focus on enjoying the celebration; I'll handle the family legacy.
features: Formal couple session and family portraits
Premium Digital Gallery in high resolution
VIP BONUS: 30-photo sneak peek the next day
BONUS: Casual 'Save the Date' session (1.5 hrs)

collections.name: Collection: Classic
collections.subtitle: The Smart Investment
collections.audience: The perfect balance. This collection is for couples who want to enjoy their wedding without interruptions, with the certainty that no key moment will be missed.
collections.promise: During 8 hours I'll document the final grooming details, the entire ceremony, a fluid and naturally-posed couple session, and the best of the reception. You'll have the complete story of your big day told in a cinematic style, giving you total freedom to have that drink and dance with your guests.
features: Formal couple session and family portraits
Premium Digital Gallery in high resolution
BONUS: Casual 'Save the Date' session (1.5 hrs)

collections.name: Collection: Essential
collections.subtitle: The Right Coverage
collections.audience: Ideal for dynamic and practical weddings where the priority is documenting the heart of the event without extending too many hours.
collections.promise: I'll be with you for 5 hours—the exact time needed to capture the ceremony, direct a quick but magazine-worthy couple session, family portraits, and your grand entrance at the reception.
features: Formal couple session and family portraits

collections.subtitle: The Essentials

about.heading: My name is Oscar Sanchez.
about.description: My mission is to help you preserve what that day has that is most valuable: the truth of your emotions. I know a wedding passes in a blink. My job isn't to interrupt those moments to ask you to smile at the camera, but to be there, documenting the magic as it naturally unfolds. With a documentary style and cinematic aesthetic, I don't just deliver photographs; I deliver the atmosphere, the colors, and the essence of your big day.

sessionFeatures.description: A 1.5-hour session in Ciudad Juárez designed to help us connect, ease any camera tension, and capture the real chemistry between you.
sessionFeatures.specialOffer: If after this session you decide to book our Classic or Signature Collection for your wedding, the full value of this session will be credited toward your final package.
